Source   Edit  

Types

EnumOutput = enum
  EnumName, EnumOrd
Source   Edit   
JsonDumper = object
  options*: JsonDumperOptions
  artery*: Artery
  flushLocks*: int
  flushPos*: int
Source   Edit   
JsonDumperOptions = object
  keepUtf8*: bool = true     ## keeps valid utf 8 codepoints in strings as-is instead of encoding an escape sequence 
  useXEscape*: bool          ## uses \x instead of \u for characters known to be small, not in json standard
  rawJsNanInf*: bool         ## produces raw NaN/Infinity/-Infinity as in js and json5, as opposed to strings as in nim json
  defaultEnumOutput*: EnumOutput
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc addToBuffer(dumper: var JsonDumper; c: char) {.inline, ...raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit

    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc consumeBuffer(dumper: var JsonDumper) {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc finishDump(dumper: var JsonDumper): string {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
returns leftover buffer Source   Edit   
proc initJsonDumper(options = JsonDumperOptions()): JsonDumper {.inline,
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
